Channel Snapshot
Top Pages

SEO & Organic Search

Primary growth driver — growing organic to reduce Google Ads spend

Google Ads

Reduce paid spend as organic coverage grows

Organic Social

Instagram · Facebook · Google Business Profile organic performance

Meta Ads

Facebook & Instagram paid social

Google Business Profile

Local search visibility — Malaga & Ellenbrook

Promo Pipeline

Two-track campaign view — Acquisition (new members) + Retention (current + at-risk members). Each promo cascades into the Work Queue items + Asset Brief required to execute it. Approve at the Monday meeting via the View Details popup.

Asset Library

Monthly shoot countdown + consolidated brief for the Asset Creator. Every "Awaiting Assets" Work Queue card blocks on a Google Drive folder link being added to its parent promo. Generate the markdown brief 7 days before the shoot.

Work Queue

Every active piece of work in one inbox — content drafts (blogs, Instagram, TikTok, GBP posts, emails) and operational fixes (SEO, GBP, ads, website). Same approval flow for all items. Move cards through the workflow from idea to done.

Performance Review

Post-publish analysis only. How did the content + actions perform after going live? Learnings here feed next cycle's Work Queue. Items appear here once their Work Queue status becomes Published.
